info.title: Skyline.DataMiner.CICD.Tools.NuGetChangeVersion
info.description: This NuGet package allows you to update a NuGet across a whole SDK style solution. Note: It does perform a NuGet Restore on projects that are using a lock file. For the others you must do this separately.

hookCapture.patchTarget: Parse-postfix (OK: Command.Parse, OK: Command.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: CommandLineParser.Parse, OK: ParseResult.Invoke, OK: ParseErrorAction.Invoke, OK: HelpAction.Invoke, OK: ParseResult.InvokeAsync, OK: RootCommand.ctor(String))

x-inspectra.cliParsedDescription: Updates NuGets on a whole VS Solution in a non-interactive way.

options.name: --nuget-name
options.description: Name of the NuGet to change.

options.name: --nuget-version
options.description: Version of the NuGet to change to.

options.name: --debug
options.description: Indicates the tool should write out debug logging. [default: False]
